If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

    --data "{
    \"invite_commission\": 9,
    \"invite_gen_limit\": 20,
    \"commission_withdraw_limit\": 35.19,
    \"commission_distribution_l1\": 63144.274,
    \"commission_distribution_l2\": 125419.251,
    \"commission_distribution_l3\": 45.7990771,
    \"logo\": \"http:\\/\\/www.windler.info\\/sit-asperiores-consectetur-debitis-enim-commodi-in\",
    \"app_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.bartoletti.com\\/et-totam-reprehenderit-ullam-ut\",
    \"try_out_plan_id\": 5,
    \"try_out_hour\": 18.921254,
    \"tos_url\": \"http:\\/\\/johns.com\\/illo-alias-perferendis-et-possimus-et-rem\",
    \"reset_traffic_method\": 4,
    \"server_token\": \"gaigyiquluabwsjvlslbspxizpxfthdcosalwbqyeuglkohulwaaddfcwwqcrj\",
    \"server_pull_interval\": 13,
    \"server_push_interval\": 9,
    \"device_limit_mode\": 14,
    \"server_ws_enable\": true,
    \"server_ws_url\": \"http:\\/\\/hoeger.com\\/\",
    \"frontend_theme_sidebar\": \"dark\",
    \"frontend_theme_header\": \"dark\",
    \"frontend_theme_color\": \"black\",
    \"frontend_background_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.schinner.net\\/dolores-voluptatem-at-ducimus-recusandae-eaque.html\",
    \"telegram_webhook_url\": \"http:\\/\\/wuckert.com\\/perferendis-neque-et-aut-tempora\",
    \"telegram_discuss_link\": \"https:\\/\\/www.steuber.org\\/numquam-ut-optio-ut-ad-et-suscipit-rerum\",
    \"email_whitelist_enable\": false,
    \"email_gmail_limit_enable\": false,
    \"captcha_enable\": true,
    \"captcha_type\": \"recaptcha-v3\",
    \"recaptcha_enable\": true,
    \"recaptcha_v3_score_threshold\": 1,
    \"email_verify\": true,
    \"safe_mode_enable\": false,
    \"register_limit_by_ip_enable\": false,
    \"register_limit_count\": 2,
    \"register_limit_expire\": 11,
    \"secure_path\": \"uibltkdzabq\",
    \"password_limit_enable\": true,
    \"password_limit_count\": 6,
    \"password_limit_expire\": 18,
    \"default_remind_expire\": false,
    \"default_remind_traffic\": true
}"

};

Example: 35.19

Example: 63144.274

Example: 125419.251

Example: 45.7990771

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.windler.info/sit-asperiores-consectetur-debitis-enim-commodi-in

stop_register   string  optional

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 10,
    \"name\": \"mllrje\",
    \"content\": \"eius\",
    \"reset_traffic_method\": 15,
    \"transfer_enable\": 11,
    \"prices\": [
        29
    ],
    \"group_id\": 8,
    \"speed_limit\": 83,
    \"device_limit\": 81,
    \"capacity_limit\": 47
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "name": "mllrje",
    "content": "eius",

    "transfer_enable": 11,
    "prices": [
        29
    ],
    "group_id": 8,
    "speed_limit": 83,
    "device_limit": 81,
    "capacity_limit": 47
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/update

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/user/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 19,
    \"email\": \"xkiehn@example.org\",
    \"password\": \"*ru+K~oSGTOFGb\\/%=!Dy\",
    \"transfer_enable\": 435823.222810486,
    \"expired_at\": 7,
    \"banned\": false,
    \"plan_id\": 6,
    \"commission_rate\": 6,
    \"discount\": 19,
    \"is_admin\": true,
    \"is_staff\": true,
    \"u\": 6,
    \"d\": 19,
    \"balance\": 17142964,
    \"commission_type\": 10,
    \"commission_balance\": 50.99,
    \"speed_limit\": 5,
    \"device_limit\": 11
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/user/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 19,
    "email": "xkiehn@example.org",
    "password": "*ru+K~oSGTOFGb\/%=!Dy",
    "transfer_enable": 435823.222810486,
    "expired_at": 7,
    "banned": false,
    "plan_id": 6,
    "commission_rate": 6,
    "discount": 19,
    "is_admin": true,
    "is_staff": true,
    "u": 6,
    "d": 19,
    "balance": 17142964,
    "commission_type": 10,
    "commission_balance": 50.99,
    "speed_limit": 5,
    "device_limit": 11
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

Example: 19

email   string  optional    

validation.email. Example: xkiehn@example.org

password   string  optional    

validation.min. Example: *ru+K~oSGTOFGb/%=!Dy

transfer_enable   number  optional    

Example: 435823.22281049

expired_at   integer  optional    

Example: 7

banned   boolean  optional    

Example: false

plan_id   integer  optional    

Example: 6

commission_rate   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 6

discount   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 19

is_admin   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_staff   boolean  optional    

Example: true

u   integer  optional    

Example: 6

d   integer  optional    

Example: 19

balance   number  optional    

Example: 17142964

commission_type   integer  optional    

Example: 10

commission_balance   number  optional    

Example: 50.99

remarks   string  optional    
speed_limit   integer  optional    

Example: 5

device_limit   integer  optional    

Example: 11

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"hysteria\",
    \"spectific_key\": \"est\",
    \"code\": \"hic\",
    \"name\": \"laudantium\",
    \"parent_id\": 8,
    \"host\": \"tenetur\",
    \"port\": \"perspiciatis\",
    \"server_port\": \"temporibus\",
    \"rate\": 1092302,
    \"rate_time_enable\": true,
    \"transfer_enable\": 37,
    \"rate_time_ranges\": [
        {
            \"start\": \"03:15\",
            \"end\": \"03:15\",
            \"rate\": 16
        }
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "hysteria",
    "spectific_key": "est",
    "code": "hic",
    "name": "laudantium",
    "parent_id": 8,
    "host": "tenetur",
    "port": "perspiciatis",
    "server_port": "temporibus",
    "rate": 1092302,
    "rate_time_enable": true,
    "transfer_enable": 37,
    "rate_time_ranges": [
        {
            "start": "03:15",
            "end": "03:15",
            "rate": 16
        }
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string     

Example: hysteria

Must be one of:
  • hysteria
  • vless
  • trojan
  • vmess
  • tuic
  • shadowsocks
  • anytls
  • socks
  • naive
  • http
  • mieru
spectific_key   string  optional    

Example: est

code   string  optional    

Example: hic

show   string  optional    
name   string     

Example: laudantium

group_ids   object  optional    
route_ids   object  optional    
parent_id   integer  optional    

Example: 8

host   string     

Example: tenetur

port   string     

Example: perspiciatis

server_port   string     

Example: temporibus

tags   object  optional    
excludes   object  optional    
ips   object  optional    
rate   number     

Example: 1092302

rate_time_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

rate_time_ranges   object[]  optional    
start   string  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 03:15

end   string  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 03:15

rate   number  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. validation.min. Example: 16

custom_outbounds   object  optional    
custom_routes   object  optional    
cert_config   object  optional    
protocol_settings   object  optional    
transfer_enable   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 37

Headers

Content-Type

  • month_price

  • onetime_price

    \"name\": \"debitis\",

    \"ended_at\": 20,

    \"limit_use_with_user\": 8
}"

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

validation.max. Example: 24

name   string     

Example: debitis

type   string     

Example: 1

Must be one of:
  • 1
  • 2
value   integer     

Example: 13

started_at   integer     

Example: 2

ended_at   integer     

Example: 20

limit_use   integer  optional    

Example: 3

Example: 8

    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": \"dolore\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/user/destroy"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": "dolore"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/destroy

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   string     

The id of an existing record in the App\Models\User table. Example: dolore

GetOrder 模块

Get order statistics with filtering and pagination

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-04-15\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-04-15\",
    \"type\": \"commission_total\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-04-15",
    "end_date": "2026-04-15",
    "type": "commission_total"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

type   string  optional    

Example: commission_total

Must be one of:
  • paid_total
  • paid_count
  • commission_total
  • commission_count

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 3

status   integer  optional    

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 19

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 14

Create-template 模块

创建礼品卡模板

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"ugpouwczevcrhi\",
    \"description\": \"Voluptatem non quaerat eos cum vel.\",
    \"type\": 11,
    \"status\": false,
    \"rewards\": [],
    \"icon\": \"i\",
    \"background_image\": \"zzijrnziygfofnmdkjet\",
    \"theme_color\": \"#AAE2f1\",
    \"sort\": 35
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "ugpouwczevcrhi",
    "description": "Voluptatem non quaerat eos cum vel.",
    "type": 11,
    "status": false,
    "rewards": [],
    "icon": "i",
    "background_image": "zzijrnziygfofnmdkjet",
    "theme_color": "#AAE2f1",
    "sort": 35
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

validation.max. Example: ugpouwczevcrhi

description   string  optional    

Example: Voluptatem non quaerat eos cum vel.

type   integer     

Example: 11

status   boolean  optional    

Example: false

conditions   object  optional    
rewards   object     
limits   object  optional    
special_config   object  optional    
icon   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: i

background_image   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. validation.max. Example: zzijrnziygfofnmdkjet

theme_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #AAE2f1

sort   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 35

Update-template 模块

更新礼品卡模板

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 15,
    \"name\": \"ygwkqzvhpqddapsrnwv\",
    \"description\": \"Accusantium ea optio vel inventore.\",
    \"type\": 20,
    \"status\": true,
    \"icon\": \"nogu\",
    \"background_image\": \"flxyrbmrcb\",
    \"theme_color\": \"#F641B4\",
    \"sort\": 9
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 15,
    "name": "ygwkqzvhpqddapsrnwv",
    "description": "Accusantium ea optio vel inventore.",
    "type": 20,
    "status": true,
    "icon": "nogu",
    "background_image": "flxyrbmrcb",
    "theme_color": "#F641B4",
    "sort": 9
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 15

name   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: ygwkqzvhpqddapsrnwv

description   string  optional    

Example: Accusantium ea optio vel inventore.

type   integer  optional    

Example: 20

status   boolean  optional    

Example: true

conditions   object  optional    
rewards   object  optional    
limits   object  optional    
special_config   object  optional    
icon   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: nogu

background_image   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. validation.max. Example: flxyrbmrcb

theme_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #F641B4

sort   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 9

Delete-template 模块

删除礼品卡模板

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/delete-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 11
}"

);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 11
};

fetch(url, {

    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 11

Generate-codes 模块

生成兑换码

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"template_id\": 6,
    \"count\": 16,
    \"prefix\": \"ic\",
    \"expires_hours\": 74,
    \"max_usage\": 10
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "template_id": 6,
    "count": 16,
    "prefix": "ic",
    "expires_hours": 74,
    "max_usage": 10
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

template_id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 6

count   integer     

validation.min validation.max. Example: 16

prefix   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^[A-Z0-9]*$/. validation.max. Example: ic

expires_hours   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 74

max_usage   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 10

Codes 模块

获取兑换码列表

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"template_id\": 20,
    \"batch_id\": \"qui\",
    \"status\": 0,
    \"page\": 67,
    \"per_page\": 15
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "template_id": 20,
    "batch_id": "qui",
    "status": 0,
    "page": 67,
    "per_page": 15
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

template_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 20

batch_id   string  optional    

Example: qui

status   integer  optional    

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 67

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 15

GetQueueMasters 模块

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueMasters" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueMasters"
);

Upload 模块

上传新主题

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpDfgBgN" 
const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

Must be a file. validation.max. Example: /tmp/phpDfgBgN

    --form "file=@/tmp/phpHfcieP"

    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upload"
);

    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());

Logs 模块

获取流量重置日志列表

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 11,
    \"user_email\": \"jed.gaylord@example.net\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-04-15T03:15:07\",
    \"end_date\": \"2034-12-27\",
    \"per_page\": 9,
    \"page\": 86
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 11,
    "user_email": "jed.gaylord@example.net",
    "start_date": "2026-04-15T03:15:07",
    "end_date": "2034-12-27",
    "per_page": 9,
    "page": 86
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer  optional    

Example: 11

user_email   string  optional    

Example: jed.gaylord@example.net

reset_type   string  optional    
trigger_source   string  optional    
start_date   string  optional    

validation.date. Example: 2026-04-15T03:15:07

end_date   string  optional    

validation.date validation.after_or_equal. Example: 2034-12-27

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 9

page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 86

curl --request GET \

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/stats

Headers

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

days   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 15

User 模块

获取用户重置历史

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/user/1/history" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"limit\": 10
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/user/1/history"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "limit": 10
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

}

validation.min validation.max. Example: 10

Reset-user 模块

手动重置用户流量

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/reset-user" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 9,
    \"reason\": \"rogfkzqlnlqiqpmhdrnyxe\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "http://localhost/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/reset-user"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 9,
    "reason": "rogfkzqlnlqiqpmhdrnyxe"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
